The Fastest Path from protocol to clean execution

A secure AI workspace for sponsors and CROs to draft, QC, review, and control changes across trial documents end to end. Works with Word and Veeva. EU, US, or UK data residency.

Book a demo

Built for industry leaders.
And the world's top firms.

CROs

Biotech

Pharma

Research

Features

01

Author documents

From protocols to patient information sheets, SOPs, and investigator brochures, Cori helps you produce first drafts of trial documents in minutes instead of weeks.

Powered by our best-in-class authoring tool, you can adapt each draft to your study needs, apply your own templates, and refine content as you go, keeping you in full control of the process.

EXPLORE MORE

02

Co-Author Word Add-in

Work better in the tools you already use. Cori’s Word Add-in brings clinical-grade AI into Microsoft Word, helping you research, draft, and review documents directly in a familiar environment.

EXPLORE AUTHOR

03

Review faster

Cori reviews documents for regulatory compliance, GxP, quality, and patient-focused requirements, helping you de-risk trials from the start.

It works alongside your team, flagging issues and inconsistencies early, suggesting improvements, and reducing costly amendments. So you move to submission with fewer and shorter review cycles.

EXPLORE REVIEW

04

Amend & track changes

Easily manage regulatory amendments, protocol changes, and updates consistently with Cori.  Track changes, sync content and preserve compliance automatically.

EXPLORE AMEND

05

Manage your trial

Cori intelligently manages clinical documents end-to-end, tracking deadlines and compliance. Keeping every document versioned, access-controlled and audit-ready, while letting you analyse content, trace decisions and monitor alignment across your trial.

EXPLORE MANAGE

The most complete AI-powered

trial assistant you have ever worked with

Accelerate trial timelines, reduce regulatory risk, and scale your studies with confidence. Optimize your operations, streamline client collaboration, deliver trials faster, and ultimately unlock higher profitability.
Simplify trial documentation, quickly set up compliant studies, and spend more time on your science. Accelerate your path to market, expand your resources, and take control of your trials.
